records.display_name: Busway benefits: reduced congestion and improved speeds

payload.claim_text: Busway regulations reduce the level of congestion along the Busway corridor. Reduced congestion helps improve bus speeds and reliability and creates more viable options for people to get around.

10% increase in bus ridership on Fordham Road

payload.claim_text: General through traffic will be restricted within Busway parameters. Only buses, trucks, and emergency vehicles will be allowed through access. All vehicles are allowed local access: vehicles are allowed to drive on busway for local trips, pick-up/drop-off, and garage access but must make the next available right turn off Busway.

records.display_name: Bus speeds below 4 mph westbound on University Heights Bridge

Bus corridor serving Bx9, Bx12 SBS/Local, Bx17, Bx22, B-L 60, B-L 61, B-L 62. 113,700 weekday riders (NYCT routes only), 53,100 use the Bx12 SBS and Local. Bus speeds 6.8 mph during AM Peak, 5.9 during PM Peak. Key issues: significant and consistent decline in bus speeds in recent years, high curb demand, frequently blocked bus lanes, traffic and sidewalk congestion.

records.display_name: Fordham Road – Inwood Bus Priority CAB Meeting #3

payload.description: Community Advisory Board Meeting #3 presentation on Fordham Road and Inwood bus priority design alternatives
payload.title: Fordham Road – Inwood Bus Priority

records.display_name: Alternative A: Bus Lanes in Both Directions

payload.description: Existing curbside bus lanes along Fordham Rd would be converted to offset lanes, allowing for more curbside parking and loading zone. Offset or curbside bus lanes will be explored on 207th St, from 10th Ave and through the University Heights Bridge.
payload.location_text: Fordham Road and 207th Street/University Heights Bridge

normalized_location.raw_text: Fordham Road and 207th Street/University Heights Bridge

records.display_name: Alternative B: Eastbound Busway from Morris Ave to Webster Ave

payload.description: Eastbound through traffic on Fordham Rd would be restricted, except for buses and trucks. Curb access would be allowed for loading/unloading. Bus lanes proposed in Alternative A would remain outside of the Busway section.
payload.location_text: Fordham Road, eastbound from Morris Ave to Webster Ave

normalized_location.raw_text: Fordham Road, eastbound from Morris Ave to Webster Ave

records.display_name: Alternative C: Busway in Both Directions

payload.description: Both eastbound and westbound through traffic on Fordham Rd would be restricted, except for buses and trucks. Curb access would be allowed for loading/unloading. Bus lanes proposed in Alternative A would remain outside of the Busway section.
